grant_title: Women & Girls Grants 2026: Community Fund for Women & Girls
project_area: Programs that empower women and girls in economic security, leadership, education, and health outcomes
demographic_requirements: Serves women and girls, including individuals who identify as cisgender, transgender, or nonbinary
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations serving Greater New Haven communities with 18–24 months of continuous programming experience, aligned with one of the four impact areas (Economic Autonomy, Leadership, Education, Health & Wellness), and serving residents within the Community Foundation’s 20-town region.
